metadata.execute_route_policy: validated auto__ramsey manifest; verified intent plus pre-enqueue advisory before managed execute.
metadata.frequency_reason: weak-pi pODMR center 3.875866667 GHz from raw/readout-aware review; center uncertainty ~1 MHz is tolerated by an FFT-aware Ramsey scout.
metadata.ramsey_grid_reason: det=2 MHz over 0..8 us with 51 points gives Nyquist about 3.125 MHz, covering the carrier plus expected ~0.39 MHz 13C sideband without requiring the 101-point grid needed for det=5 MHz.
metadata.acquisition_reason: 4 averages x 100000 repetitions gives 400000 shots for the first T2star/FFT scout; even averages preserve snake-order balance and weak-pi drift was not flagged.
comparison_targets: Ramsey route review confirmed auto__ramsey has a single tau active path
NV memory Ramsey FFT guardrail: choose det/tau span/points together
metadata.sequence_readout_roles: full_experiment=0 path has readout 1 mS=0 reference before Ramsey and readout 2 post-Ramsey signal.
